description: baseline (gelectra-base bf16-mixed bs=32 lr=1e-5 wd=0.01 cwarmup=0.33 lsmooth=0 cw=on max_pair=384) — 5 val ckpts in 20min, MLflow run righteous-carp-160

cosine + max_epochs=3 (15% lr at step 9798) — -0.003 micro -0.004 macro; cosine reduced ep2 overfit but lowered ep1 peak; MLflow caring-newt-252

gelectra-large -> mdeberta-v3-large — model doesn't exist on HF (only mdeberta-v3-base published)

lr 1.5e-5 -> 2e-5 (with focal=2) — micro within noise (-0.001), macro -0.010; lr=1.5e-5 still optimal under focal; MLflow luxuriant-kit-378 (also resumed for 40min more — peak macro 0.7480 at step 9827, declined after; lr=1.5e-5 truly better)
space_digits=true (preprocess all digits to single tokens) — -0.009 micro -0.035 macro; pretrained gelectra can't adapt to single-digit tokens in budget; MLflow 24-space-digits
